strengths: 20+ years in software development with 10+ years explicitly in full-stack roles; currently Staff Software Engineer with proven TypeScript, Node.js, and React expertise across multiple senior positions
Direct experience with required technologies: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AI-agent infrastructure (current role at re:cinq); exceeds 6+ year experience requirement
Demonstrated commitment to software craftsmanship: founded GISCollective open-source platform, led TDD workshops, organized Refactoring Dojos; clear evidence of communication and mentoring ability
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned despite being primary backend framework; demonstrates solid Node.js expertise but specific framework would require onboarding
No explicit mention of Vitest, Jest, or Playwright despite these being required testing frameworks; TDD philosophy is strong but framework-specific skills unconfirmed

Cloud and containerization experience limited: AWS CDK at Optilyz, Docker at Altom, Kubernetes only in open-source GISCollective project; no evidence of multi-cloud architecture or Kubernetes at scale
response.justification: Strong senior engineer with 20+ years experience and proven full-stack capabilities across TypeScript, Node.js, and React. Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure development, directly matching a required skill. Notable gaps: Nest.js (primary stack framework) not mentioned—suggests framework-specific ramp-up needed despite solid Node.js foundation; testing framework choices (Jest/Vitest/Playwright) not explicitly confirmed though TDD advocacy and workshop leadership indicate strong testing philosophy; cloud/Kubernetes experience is demonstrable but limited in scope compared to enterprise tooling requirements. Overall a fundamentally strong candidate who would need some stack-specific onboarding.
